author: Sebastian Hanke
description: Bulk-edit YAML frontmatter across the vault, or generate it from note content with an LLM. Snapshot undo. For OKF (Open Knowledge Format) migration. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Sebastian Hanke
manifest.description: Bulk-edit YAML frontmatter across the vault: filter notes by property, then set, rename, copy, merge or delete properties with snapshot-based undo. Ideal for OKF (Open Knowledge Format) migration; exposes a typed API for AI agents.
manifest.name: Frontmatter Operator

name: Frontmatter Operator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Frontmatter Operator 1.0.1

Install via [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat):
1. Install BRAT from Community Plugins.
2. BRAT -> Add Beta Plugin -> `https://github.com/pssah4/frontmatter-operator`

Or install manually:
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` into `.obsidian/plugins/frontmatter-operator/`.
2. Reload Obsidian.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Frontmatter Operator v1.0.0

Install via [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat):
1. Install BRAT from Community Plugins.
2. BRAT -> Add Beta Plugin -> `https://github.com/pssah4/frontmatter-operator`

Or install manually:
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` into `.obsidian/plugins/frontmatter-operator/`.
2. Reload Obsidian.
